title: 10 best herbal tinctures for premature ejaculation
intro_desc: Herbal tinctures for premature ejaculation are liquid extracts made from plants, flowers, and herbs that have been traditionally used to treat sexual dysfunction. They help by increasing sensual arousal, enhancing pleasure, and delaying orgasm, allowing individuals to achieve longer-lasting intercourse and improved control over ejaculation. Examples of herbal tinctures that can help with premature ejaculation include Catuaba, Damiana, and Ginkgo Biloba. These tinctures have been known to improve intimacy and confidence in individuals suffering from premature ejaculation, ultimately enhancing their overall sexual experience and quality of life.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Damiana tinctures helps with premature ejaculation because it has a natural sedative effect on the nervous system, calming the mind and body. This allows individuals to relax and focus on their sexual experience, rather than rushing through it. Additionally, damiana has been shown to increase serotonin levels in the brain, which can help regulate sexual arousal and reduce feelings of anxiety and excitement. As a result, those who consume damiana tinctures may experience increased control over their ejaculation, leading to a more satisfying and prolonged sexual experience.
remedy_properties: Adaptogenic properties: Damiana's adaptogenic nature helps to balance hormones, reduce stress and anxiety, and regulate the nervous system, which can contribute to premature ejaculation by calming the body and mind.
Saponin content: Saponins in Damiana have been shown to increase dopamine levels in the brain, which can help delay orgasm and improve sexual function by reducing anxiety and increasing pleasure.

Antioxidant activity: Antioxidants in Damiana help protect the body from oxidative stress, inflammation, and damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to premature ejaculation by promoting healthy blood flow and nerve function.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, roots help to reduce anxiety and stress, which can contribute to premature ejaculation.
Bark: Containing phenolic compounds, barks help to regulate hormonal imbalances and improve overall sexual function.
Seeds: High in fatty acids and phytosterols, seeds support healthy prostate function and increase semen production.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried turnera diffusa leaves and flowers in the morning when they are most potent.
Cleanse and dry the plant material by spreading it out in a single layer on paper towels for at least 24 hours.
Chop the plant material into small pieces using scissors or a mortar and pestle to increase its surface area.
Soak the chopped plant material in vodka at a ratio of 1 part turnera diffusa to 2 parts vodka for 14 days with daily shaking.
Strain the tincture through a cheesecloth or coffee filter into dark glass bottles and store it in the refrigerator for up to 6 months.

remedy_recipe: Harvest 500g of fresh or dried cuscuta chinensis roots and chop them into small pieces.

Transfer the liquid tincture to dark glass bottles and store them in the refrigerator at 2-3°c for up to 5 years.
